assessment_meta.notes: Real manual screen using listing evidence plus limited public planning-context checks. Conservative placeholders retained where authoritative site-report fields were not fully verified in-session.

frontage_access.notes: Servicing and connections are positive if true, but frontage/access dimensions remain unverified.

prior_application_history.notes: Listing notes 3-block context and notes not duplex approved; that suggests relevant site/planning context but not an authoritative history review.
